name: kafka-mcp
description: Read-only MCP server for Kafka — inspect topics, consumer groups, broker health, and sample messages.

KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS.description: Comma-separated list of Kafka bootstrap servers (e.g. broker1:9092,broker2:9092)

KAFKA_SECURITY_PROTOCOL.description: Security protocol: PLAINTEXT, SSL, SASL_PLAINTEXT, or SASL_SSL

KAFKA_SASL_MECHANISM.description: SASL mechanism: PLAIN, SCRAM-SHA-256, or SCRAM-SHA-512
